utility_evaluation.REASONING:
First, count the number of items in the required format: 1) health_coverage, 2) property_coverage, 3) travel_coverage, 4) additional_services, 5) total_budget — total of 5 items. Next, check if each appears in the final plan and is fully specified. 

1) health_coverage: Present with physical and mental health insurance and costs included (physical_health €100/month, mental_health €65/month, plus an executive_income_protection entry with cost €200/month). Meets requirement.

2) property_coverage: Present with home/contents insurance (€90/month) and liability coverage (€95/month) — includes costs. Meets requirement.

3) travel_coverage: Present with core_travel (€115/month), adult_children_transitions (€55/month), and liability (€115/month) — includes costs. Meets requirement.

4) additional_services: Present with mental_health_for_transitions (€65/month) — includes cost. Meets requirement.

5) total_budget: Present with complete monthly (€900) and annual (€10,800) cost breakdown, plus annual_savings. Meets requirement.

All 5 items are present and fully specified with the required details and costs.
